modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a short and minimally polite tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Inquiry about USD security policy on Continuous Vulnerability Management

full_description_text:  
I need to know what the security policy is for Continuous Vulnerability Management. I was looking into CIS Control 7 and got confused. Can someone explain this to me?

description: I need to know what the security policy is for Continuous Vulnerability Management. I was looking into CIS Control 7 and got confused. Can someone explain this to me?
